summary: Comprehensive testing of Filo d'Olio pizzeria menu updates completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate). Menu data updates successfully implemented with all 6 categories, updated pricing, new pizzas, and contact information correctly displayed. Order functionality and frontend-backend integration working properly.

integration_issues.issue: Language switching may not be fully functional - clicked on language option but content remained in French
Order success message timeout during automated testing (order processing worked)

passed_tests: Menu page loads with all 6 categories
New traditional pizzas: Jambon Champignon, Boscaiola, Scampi, Regina, Vegan
New 'Speciales Sans Tomate' category with all required pizzas
Phone number updated to 02 377 78 92 in contact page and footer
Order page functionality with add to cart
Size selection dialog with correct pricing
Cart functionality and order form integration
